message:
feat(fsqlite-pager): extend page cache with ARC eviction and expanded trait surface

Expand the pager crate's caching and abstraction layer:

- page_cache.rs: add cache statistics, LRU/dirty-list maintenance,
  and page-fetch pipeline integration
- page_cache/arc_cache.rs: extend the ARC (Adaptive Replacement Cache)
  implementation with ~340 lines of ghost-list tracking, adaptive
  parameter tuning, and scan-resistance logic
- arc_cache.rs (new top-level): alternate entry point / re-export
  for the ARC cache to simplify imports
- traits.rs: revise pager trait definitions to expose cache statistics,
  checkpoint coordination, and journal-mode switching
- lib.rs: wire up new module paths and update public API

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
